events.name: Manchester United at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Brighton were forced to settle for a place in the Conference League after Manchester United marked Michael Carrick's first match as permanent manager with a thumping 3-0 success and a record for Bruno Fernandes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton seal European spot despite Man Utd loss

headlines.description: Burnley came from behind to make sure the ignominy of finishing bottom of the Premier League went to Wolves as the two relegated sides fought out a 1-1 draw at Turf Moor.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burnley, Wolves draw to end disappointing season

headlines.description: Arsenal celebrated being crowned Premier League champions for the first time in 22 years with a 2-1 win against Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal celebrate PL title with win at Palace

headlines.description: Fulham gave Marco Silva a victory in what could be his final match in charge as Tom Cairney's second-half wondergoal helped earn a 2-0 Premier League win over Newcastle at Craven Cottage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fulham finish on high with win over Newcastle

headlines.description: Mohamed Salah came within the width of a post of signing off his Liverpool career with a spectacular goal but could at least claim an assist in the 1-1 draw with Brentford which guaranteed Champions League football.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah assist helps Liverpool clinch UCL place

headlines.description: Pep Guardiola was unable to sign off with one last victory as his glorious Manchester City reign ended in a 2-1 defeat to Aston Villa.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pep's City farewell spoiled by defeat to Villa

headlines.description: Bournemouth missed out on a Champions League place as Morgan Gibbs-White responded to being left out of England's World Cup squad by scoring for Nottingham Forest in a 1-1 draw.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bournemouth seal Europa League spot with draw

headlines.description: Sunderland completed their Premier League return in style after a 2-1 win over Chelsea confirmed their spot in the Europa League next season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea miss out on Europe in loss to Sunderland

headlines.description: João Palhinha's 43rd-minute goal fired Tottenham to Premier League safety with a 1-0 home win over Everton.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs beat Everton to save Premier League status

events.name: Leeds United at West Ham United

headlines.description: West Ham's final-day win over Leeds United was too little too late as they slumped to relegation from the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham relegated despite 3-0 win over Leeds

headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann's LaLiga career ended in disappointment as Villarreal tore Atlético Madrid apart to clinch third place.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villarreal thrash Atleti in Griezmann's last game

video.headline: Villarreal finish in third after thrashing Atlético Madrid 5-1

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Villarreal finish in third after thrashing Atlético Madrid 5-1) 2026/05/24 ESHEET

headlines.description: Álvaro Arbeloa signed off as Real Madrid coach with a 4-2 win over Athletic Bilbao at the Bernabéu.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid beat Athletic Club on night of farewells

video.headline: Bellingham & Mbappe score as Real Madrid end with a win

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Bellingham & Mbappe score as Real Madrid end with a win) 2026/05/23

headlines.description: Valencia scored twice in the space of five second-half minutes as they came from behind to beat LaLiga champions Barcelona 3-1, although it was not enough to earn them European qualification on the final day of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski scores in farewell as Barcelona lose

video.headline: Lewandowski signs off with a goal as Barcelona end with Valencia defeat

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Lewandowski signs off with a goal as Barcelona end with Valencia defeat) 2026/05/23

headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann set up the only goal against Girona before bidding an emotional farewell to the Atlético Madrid home crowd.
headlines.shortLinkText: Antoine Griezmann sets up Atlético winner on final home appearance

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Atlético Madrid beats Girona 1-0) 2026/05/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice in the second half as Morocco beat co-hosts Canada 3-0 in Houston to book their place in the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Morocco send Canada crashing out of World Cup

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé scored his 19th career World Cup goal, and France survived stifling heat to beat Paraguay 1-0 on Saturday, sending Les Bleus into the quarterfinals for the fourth straight time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé leads France to WCup quarterfinals

headlines.description: Stephen Eustáquio scored in second-half stoppage time, and Canada beat South Africa 1-0 to earn their first knockout match victory in a World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eustáquio heroics send Canada to WCup last-16

headlines.description: Mexico's misery in World Cup opening games was finally ended as they secured a 2-0 win over South Africa at the Estadio Azteca in a match featuring three red cards.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico kick off WC with win over SA ft. 3 red cards

headlines.description: South Korea rallied from 0-1 down to defeat the Czech Republic 2-1 in the second match of the FIFA World Cup 2026.
headlines.shortLinkText: Oh, Hwang goals see South Korea edge Czechia in thriller

headlines.description: Olga Carmona sealed Women's World Cup glory for Spain in Sydney with a first-half goal that clinched a 1-0 victory against England.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spain edge England to win first World Cup title

headlines.description: Substitute Salma Paralluelo scored in extra time to lift Spain to a nervy 2-1 victory over the Netherlands on Friday and into the semi-finals of the Women's World Cup for the first time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spain beat Netherlands to reach 1st WWC semi

events.name: AS Monaco at Le Havre AC
FC Augsburg at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Harry Kane scored a hat-trick as champions Bayern Munich celebrated lifting the Bundesliga trophy with a 5-1 win over Cologne at the Allianz Arena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane nets hat trick as Bayern rout Cologne

video.headline: Bayern Munich vs. FC Cologne - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayern Munich vs. FC Cologne - Game Highlights) 2026/05/16 ESHEET

headlines.description: Arsenal's bid to win the Champions League for the first time in their 140-year history ended in heartbreak after a penalty shootout defeat to Paris Saint-Germain.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG beat Arsenal on penalties to defend Champions League title

headlines.description: Aston Villa ended their 30-year wait for a trophy as they strolled to an emphatic 3-0 victory over SC Freiburg in the Europa League final in Istanbul.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aston Villa cruise past Freiburg to win Europa League

events.name: Atlanta United FC at Columbus Crew
Philadelphia Union at Inter Miami CF

headlines.description: Messi, who almost never gets subbed out of matches, left in the 73rd minute, meaning he was long gone before Luis Suárez's third goal of the night lifted the defending MLS champions past the last-place Philadelphia Union 6-4 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi subbed off early in Miami win over Philadelphia

video.headline: Inter Miami CF vs. Philadelphia Union - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Inter Miami CF vs. Philadelphia Union - Game Highlights) 2026/05/24 ESHEET

events.name: Austin FC at St. Louis CITY SC
Real Salt Lake at Minnesota United FC

headlines.description: Mauricio González subbed on in the 77th minute for Minnesota United and scored his first career goal in stoppage time Saturday in 1-1 tie with Real Salt Lake.
headlines.shortLinkText: Minnesota scores in stoppage time to draw with RSL

events.name: New England Revolution at Charlotte FC
Orlando City SC at FC Cincinnati
Toronto FC at Chicago Fire FC
New York City FC at Nashville SC
Red Bull New York at Sporting Kansas City
San Jose Earthquakes at Portland Timbers
Vancouver Whitecaps at San Diego FC
